title: cassia pumila var. wallichiana
intro: Cassia pumila var. wallichiana, also known as the Dwarf Cassia or Senna, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Asia and Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cassia pumila var. wallichiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Cassia pumila var. wallichiana is often dried and used as a tea, or combined with other herbs to create remedies for a range of ailments.
